Section text:
3、KOL营销将更加高效和智能：
AI可从海量达人中更高效地筛选匹配度高、性价比优的本地化 KOL，优化“洞察 —筛选—建联—复盘”全流程；

message.content:
This section addresses the application of AI in influencer marketing. It can answer questions regarding:
- **Topics & Claims:** The industry trend toward more efficient and intelligent KOL marketing enabled by AI.
- **Entities:** AI technology, KOLs (Key Opinion Leaders/influencers).
- **Procedures:** The optimized end-to-end KOL campaign workflow: Insight (洞察), Screening (筛选), Connection/Outreach (建联), and Review/Analysis (复盘).
- **Selection Criteria/Attributes:** How AI filters large creator pools to identify localized KOLs with high relevance/match rates and strong cost-effectiveness.
- **Dates, Definitions, Tables, Figures, Quantitative Metrics, & Evidence Types:** Not provided in this excerpt.

response_text:
This section addresses the application of AI in influencer marketing. It can answer questions regarding:
- **Topics & Claims:** The industry trend toward more efficient and intelligent KOL marketing enabled by AI.
- **Entities:** AI technology, KOLs (Key Opinion Leaders/influencers).
- **Procedures:** The optimized end-to-end KOL campaign workflow: Insight (洞察), Screening (筛选), Connection/Outreach (建联), and Review/Analysis (复盘).
- **Selection Criteria/Attributes:** How AI filters large creator pools to identify localized KOLs with high relevance/match rates and strong cost-effectiveness.
- **Dates, Definitions, Tables, Figures, Quantitative Metrics, & Evidence Types:** Not provided in this excerpt.
